text_preview:
## The following reports describe several UFO sightings and radar detections 2 weeks in a row in Anápolis-GO [1982] at the ANÁPOLIS Air Base between 28 APRIL and 16 MAY 1982.

First report: April 28, 1982. Time: 22:25.

At 22:25 on April 28, 1982, the Approach Control of Anápolis-GO, visualized “in the scope of the TA-10, several moving targets, between the radial 080/110 degrees, all with heading approximately 290 degrees”. According to the report, “due to the speed, it gave the impression of being a squadron of helicopters”, heading towards the Anápolis Air Base. A FAB plane [15 F-34] that w
summary: Between Apr 28 and May 16, 1982, repeated radar detections of multiple unidentified objects at Anápolis Air Base prompted FAB interceptors to scramble on several nights; one object turned off its lights on approach.
